(yadai) in front of; يديه‎ بين‎ in front of him; in his presence; in his power; بأيدينا‎ bi-aidīnā or أيدينا‎ بين‎ at our disposal; أيديكم‎ بين‎ الكلام‎ (kalāmu) you havethe floor, you may speak; من‎ أيدينا‎ بين‎ ما‎ what … are before us or present themselves to us;اليد‎ تحت‎ on hand, handy, available; يده‎ تحت‎ under his authority, in his power; يد‎ على‎ pl. أيدي‎ على‎ (with foll. genit.) at the hand(s) of; يده‎ على‎ or يده‎ عن‎ with his help, through his good offices; الناس‎ أيدي‎ على‎ with the help of other people; at the hands of other people; اليد‎ في‎ in hand, on hand, available; الجوزاء‎ يد‎ y. al-jauzā’ a bright star in Orion;الدھر‎ يد‎ أفعله‎ لا‎ (yada d-dahr) I shall never do it;المظلة‎ يد‎ y. al-miẓalla umbrella handle; النكاح‎ يد‎ conjugal authority (Isl.Law); اليد‎ ذو‎ powerful, influential; holder of actual control, possessor (Isl.
